ops.text: PHASE 1 DONE (loop hardening, cc-steer-lab): notes.py gains mark_phase/require_phase (results/<EXP>/phases/<phase>.done markers chaining driver subcommands) + finalize_experiment (errors without verdict.md w/ verdict heading; journals synthesis + final.done). New harness/invariants.py (draft_diversity, class_floors, nan_guard, fire_rate_sanity, constant_decider; enforce->InvalidCellError); record_cell(invariants=) journals INVALID CELL verdicts, stamps invalid:true, raises after journaling. New harness/judge_controls.py (ref-vs-paraphrase expect tie / ref-vs-garbage expect ref-win control pairs, ~10%/batch, cached paraphrases small-tier, ControlsReport.invariant blocks cells). metrics.py gains bootstrap_ci (percentile, n=2000, seeded) + CI + cis_overlap (overlap=tie, incumbent stays); e2_report leaderboard prints F1/win-rate 95% CIs + cis block in report.json. run_e2/run_e7 wired with require/mark + preflight enforce before spend; run_e7 now a click group (run/mark/finalize). README Runner protocol section. 193 pytest + ruff + ty clean. Pre-protocol E2/E7 markers backfilled (artifacts verified: subset/train/drafts/arms/leaderboard/final; cells/final).
